# Manglisi.vip — Cottage Rental in Manglisi, Georgia

> Cozy private cottage for rent in Manglisi resort village, 63 km from Tbilisi, Georgia. Short-term and long-term stays available.

## About
Manglisi is a pine forest resort village in Tetritskaro Municipality, Kvemo Kartli region, Georgia. Located at 1100m altitude, 63 km from Tbilisi. Known for clean mountain air, pine forests, and the historic 5th-century Manglisi Cathedral.

This cottage offers:
- Private house rental in a quiet pine forest setting
- Suitable for families, couples, and groups
- Short-term (daily) and long-term rental options
- Close to nature — hiking, fresh air, mountain scenery

## Location
- Village: Manglisi, Georgia
- Distance from Tbilisi: ~63 km (approx. 1.5 hours by car)
- Altitude: ~1100 meters above sea level
- Region: Kvemo Kartli, Tetritskaro Municipality

## Contact & Booking
- Website: https://manglisi.vip
- Language: Russian, Georgian, English

## Nearby Attractions
- Manglisi Cathedral (5th century)
- Pine forest trails
- Fresh mountain climate — ideal escape from Tbilisi heat
